---
title: "Layered Depth Image Based HEVC Multi-view Codec"
date: 2014-12-01
year: 2014
pdf: "https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-319-14364-4_36"
venue: "ISVC 2014"
code: ""
slides: ""
preprint: ""
video: "https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PL1_9GsFlZ69Z8XN9sG5jS99yjpfIR5mN-"
author:
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Lajanugen Logeswaran
  - name: Nisal Panagoda
  - name: Lakshitha Prabath Wijesinghe
  - name: Varuna De Silva
  - name: Ajith Pasqual
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
